query:
SELECT e.id, e.name, e.slug, e.short_description, e.description,
       (SELECT ei.url FROM experience_images ei WHERE ei.experience_id = e.id ORDER BY ei.sort_order ASC LIMIT 1) as first_image
FROM experiences e
WHERE e.name LIKE '%Blob%' 
   OR e.name LIKE '%Paseo%' 
   OR e.name LIKE '%Hinchable%' 
   OR e.name LIKE '%Pass Day%' 
   OR e.name LIKE '%Cableski%' 
   OR e.name LIKE '%Escolar%' 
   OR e.name LIKE '%Team Building%'
   OR e.name LIKE '%Team%'
ORDER BY e.name;
